deeperExplanation: Buffer Flushing becomes more powerful when combined with other C Programming concepts. In production, it interacts with error handling, validation, and optimization.
mutabilityExplained: Consider whether your data structures should be mutable or immutable when implementing this pattern.
noneValue: Always check for null/None/undefined values — this is the most common source of runtime errors.
internalImplementation: The c runtime handles this efficiently behind the scenes.

debuggingWalkthrough.scenario: A buffer flushing implementation behaves unexpectedly.

performanceNotes.notes: Performance varies by implementation. Profile to find bottlenecks.
